name: Aegis of Dawn
effect:
Every 2.5 seconds, steal 3 Armor from enemies within 1-hex and heal 15% of the holder's Armor.

If Aegis of Dusk is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every 1.25 seconds instead.

Healing increases based on Stage.

name: Aegis of Dusk
effect:
Every 2.5 seconds, steal 3 Magic Resist from enemies within 1 hex and deal 15% of the holder's Magic Resist as magic damage.

If Aegis of Dawn is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every 1.25 seconds instead.

Damage increases based on Stage.

name: Ahri's Aura
effect:
The holder is orbited by 3 foxfires. Each one deals 50 () magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the holder's current target.

For every 20 Mana the holder spends, foxfires travel 5% faster for the rest of combat.

name: Blacksmith's Gloves
effect:
Each round: Equip 2 random artifacts.

[Consumes 3 item slots.]

name: Blighting Jewel
effect:
Dealing magic damage reduces the target's Magic Resist by 4. If their Magic Resist is 0, grant the holder 2 Mana instead.

Ability damage can only trigger on each enemy once every 0.5 seconds.

name: Cappa Juice
stats:
+25% Attack Damage
+25 Attack Speed
+25% Ability Power
effect: The holder dons a Hat on each takedown. The holder gains 1% Attack Damage and Ability Power per Hat. On death lose 20% of all Hats.

name: Dawncore
stats:
+15% Attack Damage
+15% Ability Power
+2 Mana Regen
effect: Reduce the holder's max Mana by 10. Subsequent spellcasts reduce max Mana by 10%, to a minimum of 10.

name: Death's Defiance
effect:
50% of the damage the holder receives is instead dealt over 4 seconds as non-lethal damage.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Ekko's Patience
effect: Total Ability damage is increased by 40%, but is dealt over 2 seconds instead.

name: Eternal Pact
effect:
Combat start: Form a pact with the highest Health allied champion, if they die, gain 10 Mana regen and 40% Ability Power.

When the ally uses their ability, gain 15 Mana. Every 6 seconds, shield your ally for 200% of the holder's Ability Power.

name: Evelynn's Instinct
stats:
+10% Attack Damage
+40 Attack Speed
+10% Ability Power
effect:
When switching targets, blink to the next target. Attacks and Abilities execute the holder's target below 12% of their Health.

Kills grant the holder 50% Attack Speed decaying over 3 seconds.

name: Fishbones
effect: The holder's attacks target random enemies.

name: Flickerblades
effect: Attacks grant 5% stacking Attack Speed. Every 3 attacks also grant 2% Attack Damage and 2% Ability Power.

name: Gambler's Blade
effect:
Grant 1% bonus Attack Speed per gold in your bank (up to 30 gold).

Each attack has a 6% chance to drop 1 gold.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Gold Collector
effect:
Attacks and Abilities execute enemies below 12% of their maximum Health. Executions have a 33% chance to drop 1 gold.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Hellfire Hatchet
effect: Attacks deal 3% of the holder's max Health as bonus physical damage. For every 1% missing Health, gain 1% Attack Speed.

name: Horizon Focus
effect: Stunning an enemy causes lightning to strike them, dealing 30% of their max Health as magic damage.

name: Hullcrusher
effect: Combat Start: If there are no adjacent allies, gain 400 Health, 10% Attack Damage, and 10% Ability Power.

name: Infinity Force
stats:
+30% Attack Damage
+30 Attack Speed
+30% Ability Power
+300 Health
effect: Tons of EVERYTHING!

name: Lich Bane
effect:
The holder's first attack after each Ability cast deals 250 / 350 / 500 / 600 / 700 bonus magic damage.

Damage increases based on Stage.

name: Lightshield Crest
effect:
Every 3 seconds, Shields the lowest percent Health ally for 70% of the holder's combined Armor and Magic Resist for 5 seconds.

On death grants this shield to all allies.

name: Luden's Tempest
effect: 100% of overkill damage plus 100 is dealt as magic damage to the three enemies nearest the target.

name: Mittens
effect:
Shrinks the holder, granting them increased movement speed and immunity to Slow, Burn, and Wound.

Slow: Reduce Attack Speed

Burn: Deal 1% of the target's max Health as true damage every second

Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%

name: Mogul's Mail
effect:
Grants 1 Armor, 1 Magic Resist, and 8 Health when taking damage, stacking up to 35 times.

At full stacks, grant 1 gold and continue gaining 1 gold every 11 seconds.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Prowler's Claw
effect: After killing a target, shed negative effects and dash to the farthest target within 4 hexes. The next 2 critical attacks deal 50% bonus Critical Strike Damage.

name: Seeker's Armguard
effect: Takedowns increase the holder's Armor, Magic Resist, and Ability Power by 20.

name: Silvermere Dawn
effect:
Grants immunity to Stuns and the holder's attacks Stun the target for 0.8 seconds.

The holder's Attack Speed is locked at 0.5.

name: Sniper's Focus
stats:
+20% Attack Damage
+20 Attack Speed
+20% Ability Power
+3 Mana Regen
effect: Gain 40% Damage Amp against targets 4 or more hexes away.

name: Soraka's Miracle
effect:
The first 2 times the holder drops below 50% Health, a Miracle occurs, healing them for 20% of their max Health.

If the holder survives player combat, gain 1 player Health for each Miracle this combat.

name: Statikk Shiv
effect: Every 3rd attack deals 30 + 50% of the holder's Ability Power as additional magic damage to 4 enemies.

name: Talisman Of Ascension
effect: After 22 seconds gain 100% max Health and 120% Damage Amp for the rest of combat.

name: The Indomitable
effect:
The holder's Move Speed is drastically reduced.

Gain 15% max Health, stun immunity, and pull the current target into melee range.

name: Thresh's Lantern
effect:
After 6 seconds of combat, pull the leftmost benched unit onto the battlefield. While that unit lives, 20% of all damage the holder would take is redirected to them.

Traits of champions flung onto the board do not become active

name: Titanic Hydra
effect: Attacks deal 4% of the holder's max Health plus 6% of their Attack Damage as bonus physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies.

name: Varus's Obsession
effect:
Combat Start: Your strongest Tank becomes the Soulmate. For each second they are alive, the holder gains 3% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.

The Soulmate heals for 20% of damage the holder deals.

name: Void Gauntlet
effect:
Combat start: Store 30% max Health and 2.5% more every second. On death, unleash the stored Health as magic damage split between enemies within 4-hexes.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Wit's End
effect:
Attacks deal 30/45/65/85/100 bonus magic damage.

Heals the holder for 30% of all magic damage dealt.

Damage increases based on Stage.

name: Yasuo's Bladework
effect: Every 3 seconds, your next attack is a double attack.

name: Zhonya's Paradox
effect:
Once per combat at 40% Health, become invulnerable and untargetable for 3 seconds.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]
